title: Immersive Interfaces - Accesories (Curios API & Trinkets)
description: This texture pack adds support for Accesories (Curios API & Trinkets) matching its design with the look and feel of Immersive Interfaces.
body: **Bundle Texture Pack Compat** [**Immersive Interfaces - Mod Support Unofficial**](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/immersive-interfaces-mod-support-unofficial) ### Immersive Interfaces - Mod Support Unofficial This texture pack dedicated compatibility with Accesories (Curios API & Trinkets), integrating its design elements into the visual style of Immersive Interfaces. ### Before: ![a](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cc9077b67b95a5cbc52b650028f0434232417a25.png) ### After: ![b](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fd00e4496741cb2ecf7ae10ce61018c67989715c.png)
